analysis: The translation is of high quality, successfully maintaining the author's informal yet technical tone. It correctly handles complex MDX structures and preserves SQL code integrity. The Italian flow is natural, though there is a minor grammatical awkwardness in one of the quiz options.
strengths: Excellent preservation of technical terminology (e.g., 'type casting', 'vincoli', 'fuso orario').
Maintains the playful voice of the author ('SQL ti fa strillare?', 'È violento, signore!').
Accurate localization of technical explanations without over-translating industry-standard terms.

issues.note: Awkward phrasing in a quiz option.
issues.excerpt: Loro hanno le stesse semantiche di timestamp

issues.note: Minor inconsistency in translating 'Postgres Types' vs 'PostgreSQL Types' in group headers, though not critical.
